message:
test(bd-2ikh): add 39 unit tests for router.rs

Cover untested router areas: add_resource/prompt_with_behavior variants
(Warn/Replace/Ignore/new), resource_exists for template match,
resources/templates/prompts filtered by tags and session state,
handle_*_list with pagination and tag filters, mount_resources selective,
MountResult::has_components all fields, mount conflict warnings,
TagFilters::clone, UriTemplate::new invalid fallback, and combined
session+tags filter for resource templates.

Router tests: 99 → 138. Server tests: 1113 → 1152.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
